ddls:
CREATE TABLE "substances" (
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each substance */,
  "dss_tox_source_record_id" TEXT /* DSSTox source record ID */,
  "external_id" TEXT /* External ID */,
  "dsstox_substance_id" TEXT /* DSSTox substance ID */,
  "dsstox_structure_id" TEXT /* DSSTox structure ID */,
  "dsstox_qc_level" TEXT /* DSSTox QC level */,
  "substance_name" TEXT /* Name of the substance */,
  "substance_casrn" TEXT /* CASRN of the substance */,
  "substance_type" TEXT /* Type of substance (e.g., single compound, mixture) */,
  "substance_note" TEXT /* Note about the substance */,
  "molecular_formula" TEXT /* Molecular formula of the substance */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the substance */,
  "structure_similarity" TEXT /* Similarity score or method used for structure comparison */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* Predicted environmental impact of the substance */,
  "toxicity_level" TEXT /* Toxicity level of the substance (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the substance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the substance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("substance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "structures" (
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each structure */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substance the structure belongs to */,
  "structure_smiles" TEXT /* SMILES representation of the structure */,
  "structure_inchi" TEXT /* InChI representation of the structure */,
  "structure_inchikey" TEXT /* InChIKey representation of the structure */,
  "structure_formula" TEXT /* Molecular formula of the structure */,
  "structure_molwt" REAL /* Molecular weight of the structure */,
  "structure_3d" TEXT /* 3D structure representation of the substance */,
  "structure_similarity_score" REAL /* Numerical score for structure similarity */,
  "structure_similarity_method" TEXT /* Method used for structure similarity calculation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the structure record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the structure record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("structure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_structures_substance_id FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id") REFERENCES substances ("substance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher, guest) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the session belongs to */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Time the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or device */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., active, expired, terminated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "searches" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the search */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Query used for the search */,
  "search_results" TEXT /* Results of the search */,
  "search_type" TEXT /* Type of search (e.g., name, CASRN, structure) */,
  "search_time" TEXT /* Date and time the search was performed */,
  "search_results_count" INTEGER /* Number of results returned by the search */,
  "search_duration" REAL /* Duration of the search in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_searches_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substance the update belongs to */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time the update was made */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., structure, properties, notes) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the update record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the update record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_updates_substance_id FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id") REFERENCES substances ("substance_id")
)
